CONTENT.Club career: Ceccaroni is a youth exponent from Spezia Calcio. He made his debut on 1 November 2014 against Pescara in a Serie B match. He came on as a 63rd-minute substitute for Niko Datković in a 2–1 away win.On 5 August 2017, he scored his first goal with Spezia in the Coppa Italia match against Reggiana and it was over 3-0 for the Aquilotti.On 3 July 2018, he joined Padova on a season-long loan. Padova held an option to purchase his rights at the end of the loan term.On 7 August 2019, he joined Venezia on loan with a purchase option. On 23 August 2020, Venezia exercised the option and Ceccaroni signed a 3-year contract with the club.On 31 January 2023, Ceccaroni was loaned to Lecce, with an option to buy.On 7 July 2023, Ceccaroni signed a four-year deal with Palermo.

SUMMARY: Pietro Ceccaroni (born 21 December 1995) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a centre back for Serie B club Palermo.
